title: Vampire Lord pays a creature card cost

card.rawText: During your turn, you may send 1 creature from your hand to your cemetery. Heal this card 2x the amount of the total HP of the sent creature.

plan.title: Vampire Lord pays a creature card cost
plan.summary: During your turn, verify Vampire Lord can send 1 hand creature to cemetery as its cost.

notes: Place Vampire Lord on field with another creature in hand to pay the cost.
During your turn, you may send 1 creature from your hand to your cemetery. Heal this card 2x the amount of the total HP of the sent creature.

steps: Activate Vampire Lord during player_1 turn.
Send one creature from hand to cemetery.
